title: spec_restored event payload
$comment: Class: REQUIRES_SPEC_ID. Records a governed restoration of a recoverable archived or retired spec body back into .caws/specs/<id>.yaml. Restore is an explicit resurrection path, distinct from create: create still refuses archived tombstone ids, while restore requires prior spec_archived/spec_retired recovery metadata and refuses to overwrite an existing canonical spec.

source_event.description: The tombstone event class used to recover the body.

from_path.description: Repo-root-relative path the spec yaml occupied before archive or retirement.

blob_sha.description: Optional full 40-hex git blob sha used to recover the body when available.

restored_path.description: Repo-root-relative canonical spec path written by restore.
